entities.description: The state in India where Nalgonda district is located

entities.description: People residing in the Nalgonda district

entities.name: SUMMER MONTHS

entities.description: Physical constructions implemented across watersheds to improve water retention

entities.name: WATER LEVEL
entities.description: The height of water in wells and bore wells

entities.name: OPEN WELLS
entities.description: Traditional shallow wells used for water extraction

entities.name: BORE WELLS
entities.description: Deep narrow wells drilled into the ground for water extraction

entities.name: GROUND WATER LEVEL
entities.description: The level below the land surface at which the soil or rocks are saturated with water

entities.name: FARMERS
